creator: asavartsov@gmail.com
text:
When choosing FTP mirror in sysinstall, Israel line displays as 

Isreal                   ftp.il.freebsd.org

Fix: 

Change Isreal to Israel on that line.
How-To-Repeat: Run sysinstall, then Configure, then Distributions, select something. Choose OK. When asked for a source, tap FTP. Scroll to line 

Isreal                   ftp.il.freebsd.org

in mirror list.
